sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35837" key="e)nnenh/konta" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐννενή-κοντα</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐννενη-κοστός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐννενη-κονταετής</orth>, ff.ll. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐνεν-.</foreign> </entryFree>
